name: maintenance crawl way
description: I'm in a maintenance crawl way
hints: The maintenance crawlway has a crystal holder and broken crystal pieces.
The broken power crystal is the key to fixing the ship.
Take the broken crystal pieces - they need to be repaired.
GET CRYS. You need to FIX CRYS to repair the ship's power system.
notes: Maintenance crawlway with broken power crystal. FIX CRYS is essential to complete the game.
